message:
test(snapshots): update dashboard snapshots for compacted layout

Regenerate all 8 dashboard snapshot files to reflect the TUI layout
changes from the preceding commit:

- Title band row ("Agent Mail Dashboard") removed across all sizes
- Summary band reduced from 3 to 2 rows with more KPI columns visible
  (Locks, Contacts, Projects, Error %, Ring Fill, Drops now shown)
- Quick-filter pills row ([1:All] [2:Msg] [3:Tools] [4:Resv]) now
  visible in the space reclaimed from the title band
- Empty event log now shows contextual guidance ("No events yet...")
  instead of blank space
- Footer status bar removed on 80x24 and 100x30 (Compact/Normal class)
- "Awaiting data..." trend panel placeholders removed since the trend
  panel is now hidden when there is no data
- "No message traffic yet..." bottom rail text removed since the footer
  panel is now hidden when there is no preview content

Updated snapshots:
  - app_dashboard_80x24.snap
  - app_dashboard_100x30.snap
  - app_dashboard_120x40.snap
  - app_dashboard_160x48.snap
  - dashboard_compact_40x12.snap
  - dashboard_empty_80x24.snap
  - dashboard_empty_120x40.snap
  - dashboard_ultrawide_200x50.snap

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
